title: Metaplanet launches VC and asset management subsidiaries, bets on Japanese stablecoin JPYC
message_html: Metaplanet launches VC and asset management subsidiaries, bets on Japanese stablecoin JPYC ...
snippet: The venture capital arm will deploy 4 billion yen ($25 million) over the next few years to local bitcoin infrastructure firms.

title: Binance.US names new CEO as crypto exchange eyes expansion
message_html: Binance.US names new CEO as crypto exchange eyes expansion ...
snippet: Stephen Gregory, a former compliance executive at CEX.IO and Gemini, has taken over as CEO of Binance.US, a crypto exchange that was once a target of a long-running SEC lawsuit.

title: Ghana greenlights 11 crypto companies for regulatory sandbox
message_html: Ghana greenlights 11 crypto companies for regulatory sandbox ...
snippet: Ghana’s SEC could grant a full license to sandbox participants as early as six months, provided that their products are market-ready and that they tick all regulatory boxes.
